title: Work Management - Monday native Conditional Status
excerpt: Can you please make conditional status on work management a native feature like it is on the CRM and Dev.  Not sure why work management is being left out for this feature.  This is crucial to our work process and we have…

posts.author: Dan1 (Danim Ahmed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you please make conditional status on work management a native feature like it is on the CRM and Dev. Not sure why work management is being left out for this feature. This is crucial to our work process and we have to follow a process where certain tasks need to completed first.

Monday has this already built out, it just needs to be added to the Work Management Product.

Thanks.
